revisions.label: Witness chain repair: case 1 leaf restoration + case 39 opening + mojibake cleanup
Witness chain repair: case 6 koan restoration + volume-end title line

events.summary: Edition charter created for Wumenguan 1632 NDL reading edition.
events.details: Goal: produce a freely-licensed (CC0) reading text from public-domain Japanese woodblock scans, independent of any CBETA material.

events.summary: Identified NDL 12865429 (1632 woodblock, 1 juan) on Wikimedia Commons as primary base witness.
Identified Waseda bunko31 e1102 (1752 Mumonkan) as secondary cross-check witness.
Downloaded NDL12865429_wumenguan_1juan.pdf (188,151,699 bytes).
Rights: PD-old confirmed. No CBETA markers. Vetting: high.
Downloaded WUL-bunko31_e1102_mumonkan.pdf (47,017,686 bytes).
Rights: PD-old confirmed via Commons hosting. Vetting: high.
NDL 12865429 selected as base witness. Waseda 1752 assigned secondary cross-check role.
Multi-engine OCR comparison: Tesseract, RapidOCR, PaddleOCR on ndl-1632 pages.
Identified NDL 2537788 (Wumen Huikai Recorded Sayings) as tertiary corroborant.
Downloaded NDL2537788_wumen_kai_record.redownload2.pdf (246,780,631 bytes).
Rights: PD-Japan confirmed. 70-page copy validated. Vetting: high.
Reading-edition markdown converted to TEI XML via deterministic converter.
events.details: Source: WUMENGUAN_1632_READING_EDITION.md (30,903 bytes). Converter: convert-wumenguan-1632.mjs. Cases 1-48 in core spine, case 49 in appendix. Line-ID namespace: wm32.

events.summary: Edition maturity set to draft. Rights confirmed, hashes recorded, no CBETA material.
Witness chain repair: restored case 1 opening and case 39 interruption phrase.
events.details: Source-draft audit found PDF p.008 left leaf was missing from the witness draft, causing case 1 無門曰 to lose its opening paragraph (參禪須透祖師關...如何是祖師關). PDF p.007 right was also missing as a text-bearing contents leaf. Case 39 had dropped the opening interruption 一句未絕。門遽曰：. All repaired in the witness draft + rebuild chunks + reading edition markdown, then the TEI XML was regenerated from the corrected source. A leaf-coverage audit script was added to prevent recurrence. CP1252-style mojibake across the entire markdown chain was also cleaned in the same pass.

events.summary: TEI XML regenerated from repaired + mojibake-cleaned reading edition.
events.details: Converter: convert-wumenguan-1632.mjs. Output: 7 preface blocks, 48 core cases, 8 appendix divs, 967 total lines, 1168 lb elements. Zero mojibake sequences remaining. Case 1 now begins with 參禪須透祖師關, case 39 includes 一句未絕。門遽曰：.

events.summary: Witness chain repair: restored case 6 koan block and appendix volume-title line.
events.details: A witness-to-draft audit restored the case 6 koan block 世尊云：吾有正法眼藏...付囑摩訶迦葉, which had been dropped from the checked-in reading-edition chain despite remaining visible in the base witness across PDF p.014 right/left. The appendix volume-end material also regained the witness-backed line 無門卷 ahead of 無門關卷終. The diplomatic draft, rebuild chunks, and checked-in source-reading-edition mirror were updated together.

events.summary: TEI XML regenerated from repaired reading-edition source.
events.details: Source: provenance/wumenguan-1632/source-reading-edition.md (29,427 bytes, SHA-256 79c8ac619bd2ab3ca11de2d3950de97a0791a8772ca791fe106f28598cc9856a). Converter: convert-wumenguan-1632.mjs. Output: 7 preface blocks, 48 core cases, 8 appendix divs, 976 total lines, 1177 lb elements. Case 6 now includes the 世尊云 block and the volume-end appendix now carries 無門卷.
